meta_description: Junying offers copper sheet metal fabrication services that can manufacture sheet metal copper parts in almost all sizes and shapes.

sections.heading: Copper Sheet Metal Fabrication
sections.text: Copper Sheet Metal Fabrication There are various alloys used in the copper sheet metal fabrication process. The pure copper comes in light red. After the copper oxide film is formed on the surface, the appearance is purplish red. Copper metal sheets have strong physical and chemical properties, such as good electrical and thermal conductivity, especially the electrical conductivity is second only to silver, and its thermal conductivity is second only to gold and silver. Copper has great chemical stability, good corrosion resistance in the atmosphere, fresh water and seawater, good ductility, and can well withstand all kinds of cold and hot pressure processing. The disadvantage is that the s...

sections.heading: Why Choose Copper Sheet Metal Fabrication at Junying
sections.text: Copper sheet metal is ideal for industrial production due to its high flexibility. As a metal machining and metal fabrication company, Junying offers copper sheet metal fabrication services that can manufacture sheet metal copper parts in almost all sizes and shapes, whether you require products for decorative purposes or industrial applications. Copper is a highly corrosion-resistant material, so copper sheet metal fabricated components are the go-to option for various pipes and tubes. Copper sheet metal parts are typically made from C101 and C110 grades of copper, we also work with other alloys if you need them. We can fabricate a wide selection of custom sheet metal copper parts, such as...
